## What does this PR do?

A one-paragraph summary.

## Related issue

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature

## How was this tested?

- [ ] `swift build -c release` succeeds
- [ ] App launches and the change behaves as expected
- [ ] Manual smoke test of affected flows
- [ ] Existing tests pass (`swift test`)
- [ ] New tests added (if applicable)

## Screenshots / video

For UI changes — before/after.

## Checklist

- [ ] PR is scoped to a single concern
- [ ] No dependencies added unless necessary
- [ ] Followed the existing code style
- [ ] Updated docs / README if user-facing
